source_pr.title: *: remove deprecated LOAD DATA actions
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref #44078

Problem Summary:

### What changed and how does it work?
- remove PAUSE LOAD DATA and other statements
- remove asyncloaddata package, move Job and Progress structure into importer package

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [x] No need to test
  > Only remove unused codes

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR removes deprecated LOAD DATA actions and refactors/removes the async load data package (moving related structs into importer). The case evidence does not clearly indicate a flaky failure mode or a targeted stabilization fix, so we keep a conservative fallback classification.
fix_pattern: Remove deprecated LOAD DATA statements/actions and refactor async load-data code (remove old package; move job/progress structs into importer).

evidence: files: pkg/disttask/importinto/BUILD.bazel, pkg/disttask/importinto/proto.go, pkg/disttask/importinto/task_executor.go, pkg/executor/BUILD.bazel, pkg/executor/asyncloaddata/BUILD.bazel, pkg/executor/asyncloaddata/main_test.go, pkg/executor/asyncloaddata/progress.go, pkg/executor/asyncloaddata/progress_test.go, pkg/executor/asyncloaddata/util.go, pkg/executor/asyncloaddata/util_test.go, pkg/executor/builder.go, pkg/executor/import_into.go, pkg/executor/importer/BUILD.bazel, pkg/executor/importer/engine_process.go, pkg/executor/importer/import.go, pkg/executor/importer/progress.go, pkg/executor/load_data.go, pkg/parser/ast/dml_test.go, pkg/parser/ast/misc.go, pkg/parser/parser.go, pkg/parser/parser.y, pkg/planner/core/planbuilder.go
